description_long: This e-cigarette store is a single-story, modern commercial building with a flat, dark-tiled roof and a sleek, rectangular form. The facade features large, blue-tinted glass windows and a prominent black-framed entrance, providing a contemporary and inviting appearance. The exterior walls are clad in dark wood paneling, adding warmth and texture to the overall design. The left section of the building includes a geometric arrangement of smaller windows, contributing visual interest and natural light. The structure appears solid and well-constructed, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The building is designed to fit seamlessly into an urban streetscape, offering a stylish and functional retail environment.
description: A modern, single-story e-cigarette store with a flat, dark-tiled roof, large blue-tinted windows, and dark wood paneling. The facade is sleek and contemporary, featuring a prominent entrance and geometric window accents.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entrance, large blue-tinted windows, and a geometric arrangement of smaller windows on the left side.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the extended roof and a single large window, with minimal detailing on the wall.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid wall with a few small windows and a secondary door, emphasizing the building's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals a small window and utility features, with the roof's overhang clearly visible.
attribute_architectural_style: modern; characterized by a flat roof, large glass windows, dark wood paneling, and clean geometric lines.
